seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: The email must include the keyword "gratitude" at least once.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "gratitude" in the email.
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. The email must include the keyword "gratitude" at least once. Avoid using the keyword "gratitude" in the email.
response:
Subject: Thank You for the Opportunity – [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to express my sincere appreciation for the opportunity to complete my internship under your supervision. The experience has been incredibly valuable, and I have gained significant insights into [mention specific field or skill] that I will carry forward into my future career.

Your guidance, mentorship, and the resources you provided were instrumental in my success during this program. I truly value the time we spent discussing my progress and the feedback you offered; it has helped me grow both professionally and personally.

Please accept this note as a token of my deep **gratitude** for your support. I look forward to staying in touch and hope to contribute to your research or projects in the future.

Thank you again for everything.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Contact Information]
